# Golden file: database.mysql pack (E2)
# 14 cases: 4 destructive-high, 4 destructive-medium, 6 safe/edge
format: v1
---
# D1: DROP DATABASE
command: mysql -e "DROP DATABASE myapp"
decision: Ask
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: database.mysql
rule: mysql-drop-database
---
# D2: mysqladmin drop (no env escalation — "production" in "myapp_production"
# has no word boundary due to underscore)
command: mysqladmin drop myapp_production
decision: Ask
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: database.mysql
rule: mysqladmin-drop
---
# D3: DROP TABLE
command: mysql -e "DROP TABLE users"
decision: Ask
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: database.mysql
rule: mysql-drop-table
---
# D4: TRUNCATE
command: mysql -e "TRUNCATE TABLE orders"
decision: Ask
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: database.mysql
rule: mysql-truncate
---
# D5: DELETE FROM without WHERE (Medium)
command: mysql -e "DELETE FROM users"
decision: Ask
severity: Medium
confidence: Medium
pack: database.mysql
rule: mysql-delete-no-where
---
# D6: UPDATE without WHERE (Medium)
command: mysql -e "UPDATE users SET active=false"
decision: Ask
severity: Medium
confidence: Medium
pack: database.mysql
rule: mysql-update-no-where
---
# D7: ALTER TABLE ... DROP (Medium)
command: mysql -e "ALTER TABLE users DROP COLUMN email"
decision: Ask
severity: Medium
confidence: Medium
pack: database.mysql
rule: mysql-alter-drop
---
# D8: mysqladmin flush-tables (Medium)
command: mysqladmin flush-tables
decision: Ask
severity: Medium
confidence: High
pack: database.mysql
rule: mysqladmin-flush
---
# S1: SELECT is safe
command: mysql -e "SELECT * FROM users"
decision: Allow
---
# S2: mysqldump is safe
command: mysqldump mydb > backup.sql
decision: Allow
---
# S3: mysql interactive is safe
command: mysql -h localhost mydb
decision: Allow
---
# S4: mysqladmin status is safe
command: mysqladmin status
decision: Allow
---
# S5: DELETE with WHERE is safe
command: mysql -e "DELETE FROM users WHERE id = 1"
decision: Allow
---
# S6: UPDATE with WHERE is safe
command: mysql -e "UPDATE users SET active=false WHERE id=1"
decision: Allow
